label: Limits Hierarchy
description: Interactive six-level hierarchy tree for limit management. Shows all limits with utilisation and breach status.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.6.note: Skeleton loading guard to tree section (TableWidget already handled detail table).

0.7.note: Tree renders empty naturally; TableWidget emptyMessage='No limits available'.

0.8.note: hasError guard returning plain error message.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=[execution-basic,execution-full]. 0.3 availableOn=[risk]. 0.4 No any/ts-ignore. 0.5 No lib/mocks imports. 0.6 Added Skeleton loading guard to tree section (TableWidget already handled detail table). 0.7 Tree renders empty naturally; TableWidget emptyMessage='No limits available'. 0.8 Added hasError guard returning plain error message. 0.9 No dead code.

1.2.note: use-risk-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope() line 78. 1.3-1.5 Scope filters via getStrategyIdsForScope, riskLimits filtered by strategy entity.

1.3.note: 1.5 Scope filters via getStrategyIdsForScope, riskLimits filtered by strategy entity.

1.5.note: Scope filters via getStrategyIdsForScope, riskLimits filtered by strategy entity.

1.7.note: (context only, cannot fix in widget pass): MOCK_STRATEGIES/STRATEGY_RISK_MAP/COMPONENT_TO_RISK_TYPE re-exported from lib/mocks/fixtures/risk-data.ts via context line 179 — these constants should live in lib/constants/risk.ts.

l1.notes: 1.1 Data via useRiskData() hook only. 1.2 use-risk-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope() line 78. 1.3-1.5 Scope filters via getStrategyIdsForScope, riskLimits filtered by strategy entity. 1.6 scopeStrategyIds.length===0 returns unfiltered riskLimitsRaw. 1.7 FINDING (context only, cannot fix in widget pass): MOCK_STRATEGIES/STRATEGY_RISK_MAP/COMPONENT_TO_RISK_TYPE re-exported from lib/mocks/fixtures/risk-data.ts via context line 179 — these constants should live in lib/constants/risk.ts.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Applies to: live ✓, paper ✓, batch ✓. Read-only hierarchy view; no mode-specific behavior.

3.2.note: isBatchMode in context; not used by this widget (no action buttons).

3.5.note: Paper mode: same hierarchy with paper account limits.

l3.notes: Human must verify 3.4 (batch indicator visible in layout).

4.1.note: Hierarchy row onClick calls setSelectedNode with real state handler. 'Clear' button calls setSelectedNode(null). CollapsibleSection handled by shared component.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

l4.notes: Human must verify 4.4 (row click highlights selected node and shows breadcrumb), 4.7 (All Limits Detail collapsible toggles), 4.8 (TableWidget scrolls within bounds).

5.1.note: Target strategies: all risk-bearing strategies. Shows 6-level hierarchy: company → client → account → strategy → underlying → instrument.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex colors in widget.

7.4.note: RiskLimitsHierarchyWidget PascalCase, detailColumns defined at module level. File kebab-case.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: selectedHierarchyNode computed inline but no useMemo needed (simple find on small array). detailColumns is module-level stable ref.

8.1.note: text-[10px]/text-[11px] replaced with text-micro/text-caption tokens per consolidated globals.css; no arbitrary typography classes remain.

8.2.note: No bracket spacing violations. paddingLeft set via style prop (not Tailwind — structural indent not a spacing token violation).

8.3.note: Uses Button, Skeleton, Table, StatusBadge, CollapsibleSection, TableWidget from ui/shared.

8.4.note: Agent: interactive TableRow has cursor-pointer but no role/tabIndex. Will defer full a11y to human walkthrough. ChevronRight icon inside breadcrumb is decorative.

8.5.note: Human: resize test at minW=6, minH=3 required.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed (tokens applied). 8.2/8.3 pass. 8.4 partially clean (TableRow onClick needs human a11y check). 8.5 needs human verification.

mergeCandidate.rationale: Both show limit utilization. Limits hierarchy shows full 6-level tree; utilization shows top-N sorted. Complementary — keep separate.

relationships.notes: selectedNode is widget-local state. Row click sets a breadcrumb context within the widget only (not cross-widget).

dataContract.notes: riskLimits from useRiskLimits() SWR hook. sortedLimits derived in context. First 6 rows shown in hierarchy tree; all limits in detail table.

gaps: Hierarchy tree shows first 6 limits (not truly hierarchy-aware — riskLimits.slice(0,6)); should filter by parentId for true tree rendering
coverage.notes: 6-level hierarchy: company → client → account → strategy → underlying → instrument.

knownIssues: L1.7: MOCK_STRATEGIES/STRATEGY_RISK_MAP/COMPONENT_TO_RISK_TYPE in lib/mocks/fixtures/risk-data.ts re-exported via context — move to lib/constants/risk.ts (context-level fix, not widget-level)

findings.description: Added Skeleton loading guard to hierarchy tree section (was missing — only TableWidget had loading state)
Added hasError early-return guard to hierarchy tree section
risk-limits-hierarchy-widget.tsx — ~20 user-visible strings (column headers, level labels, scope breadcrumb)
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: risk-limits-hierarchy-widget.tsx — text-[10px], text-[11px] used for dense hierarchy row labels
findings.fix: Applied text-micro (10px), text-nano (9px), text-caption (11px) tokens per consolidated globals.css; arbitrary text-[Npx] classes removed
